sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68382" key="molubdokrateutai/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολυβδο-κρᾰτευταί</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n68382.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μολύβδινοι κρατευταί</ref> </xr> (v. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κρατευταί</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), Demioprat. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:96" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.96</biblScope> </bibl> (nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μολύβδου κ.</foreign>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κρατευταί</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
